core_arc: Child sees someone with a problem and helps them solve it.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.PERSON: Person who needs help — neighbour, friend, family member
personalisation_slots.LOCATION: Where it happens — the garden, the street, home

scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] at [LOCATION], noticing [PERSON] who looks upset or frustrated.
[NAME] approaching [PERSON], concerned expression. [PERSON] explaining the problem.

scenes.outline: [NAME] thought hard. 'I can help!' said [NAME]. 'I have an idea.'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] thinking, perhaps finger to chin. Light bulb moment expression.

scenes.outline: [NAME] began to [SOLUTION]. It was hard work but [NAME] did not give up.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] actively helping, engaged in [SOLUTION]. Determined expression.

scenes.outline: [NAME] kept going. Soon the job was done. [PERSON] looked at [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] finishing the task, [PERSON] watching with growing happiness.

scenes.outline: 'You did it!' said [PERSON]. 'Thank you so much, [NAME]!' [PERSON] was so happy.
scenes.illustration_brief: [PERSON] thanking [NAME], perhaps a hug or handshake. Big smiles.

scenes.outline: [NAME] felt proud. Helping others felt good. It was the best feeling.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] looking proud and happy, [PERSON] in background still smiling.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went home. 'I helped someone today,' said [NAME]. That made the day special.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] at home, telling someone about their day, happy expression.

comprehension_questions.inference: How do you think [NAME] felt when [PERSON] said thank you?
comprehension_questions.prediction: How could you help someone today?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: h, l, p. Copy the word: help.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: helped, kind, happy. Write about a time you helped someone.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about how [NAME] helped [PERSON]. Why is it good to help others?

dinosaurs.PROBLEM: I cannot reach my toy dinosaur
dinosaurs.SOLUTION: climb up carefully and get the dinosaur down

space.PROBLEM: I cannot find my rocket book
space.SOLUTION: look everywhere and find the book

football.PROBLEM: My ball went over the fence
football.SOLUTION: find a way to get the ball back

animals.PROBLEM: My cat is stuck in a tree
animals.SOLUTION: coax the cat down with food

baking.PROBLEM: I cannot reach the mixing bowl
baking.SOLUTION: get a stool and pass down the bowl

nature.SOLUTION: water the plant and give it light

vehicles.SOLUTION: fix the wheel back on the car

music.SOLUTION: help turn the pegs until it sounds right

art.SOLUTION: help clean up and get more paint
